caption: Two men are seated in a room in front of a large television screen. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and maintains a neutral, slightly skeptical facial expression. The man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, sitting with his hand near his chin, looking toward the left. Behind them, a shelf holds numerous CD cases. The television screen displays the glowing yellow text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" at the top, with a smaller inset video playing below it that shows a figure in a red cloak in a stylized, dark environment. Throughout the sequence, the men remain relatively still, though the man on the right shifts his gaze and head position slightly. The background and the on-screen text remain constant across the frames, while the image in the inset video subtly changes as the scene progresses.
